description_long: This object consists of three cucumbers, two of which are cut and one that is whole. The cucumbers have a vibrant green skin with subtle lighter green stripes running lengthwise, giving them a fresh and natural appearance. The cut ends reveal a pale, moist, and slightly translucent interior typical of fresh cucumbers. The surface of the cucumbers is smooth with a slight sheen, and the skin appears thin and tender. The overall shape is elongated and cylindrical, with gentle tapering at the ends. The arrangement suggests they have been freshly prepared, possibly for culinary use or display.
description: Three cucumbers, two cut and one whole, with green striped skin and pale interiors, arranged together.
description_view_0: Front view showing the whole cucumber and two cut pieces with visible pale interiors.
description_view_1: Angled view highlighting the cylindrical shape and the cut ends of the cucumbers.
description_view_2: Top-down view emphasizing the length and green striped skin of all three cucumbers.
description_view_3: Side view showing the alignment of the cucumbers and the contrast between skin and interior.
attribute_location: isolated in space with an undefined background
attribute_orientation: lying flat and slightly angled relative to each other
attribute_visible_markings: subtle lighter green stripes running lengthwise on the skin
